title: Smart Alert System
desc: Motion sensor that sends a notification when triggered.
fullDesc: Build a home security system using a PIR (Passive Infrared) motion sensor. When motion is detected, it triggers a buzzer alarm AND sends a notification to your phone via WiFi. This project introduces you to the same technology used in real home security systems and automatic lights in offices! Combine hardware sensing with cloud notifications.
author: Tinkering Lab
